question: The scatter plot shows daily screen time vs. sleep. Which statement is best supported by the chart data?

options.A: On average, more daily screen time is associated with fewer hours of sleep.
options.B: On average, more daily screen time is associated with more hours of sleep.
options.C: There is no clear relationship between screen time and sleep.
options.D: People with the most screen time always get the most sleep.

explanation: This scatter plot uses dual encoding: point position shows the relationship, but point size and color also encode the y-variable, making high values overly salient. That can tempt viewers to overstate the strength or form of the relationship.
